artifacts.description: Root-cause analysis, code changes, validation metrics, and next steps for fair-start traces and LJ75 outlier suppression.
Fair-start energy-gap curves for LJ13/LJ38, SSW vs ASE-BH vs ASE-GA.
Final LJ75 seed0 budget60 SSW/ASE-BH/ASE-GA metric comparison after outlier controls.
Nearest-neighbor geometry check for exported LJ75 minima after outlier controls.
Exported minima for SSW, ASE-BH, and ASE-GA on LJ75 seed0 budget60.
